title: Charred Polish Paella
description: A savory and smoky paella dish made with charred polish sausage, perfect for a hearty dinner.

ingredients.name: Paella Rice
ingredients.notes: Special Spanish rice used in paella

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the charred polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the charred bell peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the paella rice, diced tomato, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
